mapper.select:
SELECT POHD.GATE_CD , PODT.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , POHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PROGRESS_CD , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PO_SQ , POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) END) AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_AMT , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_DATE , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_REJECT_RMK , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.PO_QT - (PODT.GR_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS UN_PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , POHD.CUR , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.VAT_TYPE , PODT.DUE_DATE , PODT.INV_QT , PODT.GR_QT , TRUNC((PODT.GR_QT, 0) * PODT.UNIT_PRC) AS GR_AMT ,(CASE WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(PODT.ITEM_AMT / 11) WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(PODT.ITEM_AMT * 0.1) ELSE 0 END) AS VAT_AMT FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ ,(SUM(IVDT.INV_QT), 0) AS INV_QT ,(SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT), 0) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) IN ('100', '200') -- 발주잔량 = 발주수량 - 입고수량 - 작성중 및 요청완료 수량 GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD, IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = '200' AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG = '0' AND (PODT.PO_QT + (PODT.PO_QT - (PODT.INV_QT, 0) + (CASE WHEN (PODT.GR_QT, 0) > 0 THEN (PODT.INV_QT, 0) ELSE 0 END - (PODT.GR_QT, 0)))) > (PODT.INV_QT, 0)
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
ORDER BY POHD.PO_NUM DESC, PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT (CASE WHEN X.INV_QTY > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS INV_QTY FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS INV_QTY FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM) JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN('300') ) X WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT MAX(POHD.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_CD , MAX(POHD.PO_NUM) AS PO_NUM , MAX(POHD.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , MAX(PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE) AS PURCHASE_TYPE , MAX(POHD.VENDOR_CD) AS VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(MAX(POHD.GATE_CD), MAX(POHD.VENDOR_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , #{ses.userId} AS PIC_USER_ID , #{ses.userNm} AS PIC_USER_NM , #{ses.telNum} AS PIC_TEL_NUM , #{ses.cellNum} AS PIC_CELL_NUM , MAX(POHD.CUR) AS CUR , MAX(POHD.VAT_TYPE) AS VAT_TYPE , 0 AS INV_AMT , 0 AS INV_QT , 0 AS VAT_AMT , MAX(VNGL.IRS_NO) AS IRS_NO FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POHD.PO_NUM PODT.PO_SQ IN
#{value.PO_NUM} #{value.PO_SQ}

SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , IVHD.INV_NUM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVHD.PURCHASE_TYPE , IVHD.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,IVGH.VENDOR_USER_NM AS PIC_USER_NM ,IVGH.VENDOR_TEL_NUM AS PIC_TEL_NUM ,IVGH.VENDOR_CELL_NUM AS PIC_CELL_NUM , IVHD.CUR , IVHD.VAT_TYPE , IVHD.INV_AMT , 0 AS INV_QT , IVHD.VAT_AMT , IVGH.RMK_TEXT_NUM , IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(IVHD.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE ,(IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INV_DATE , VNGL.IRS_NO FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = IVHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM}

SELECT IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.INV_NUM , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , PODT.DUE_DATE , PODT.PO_QT - (PODT.GR_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '400') THEN (IVDT.INV_QT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS UN_PO_QT -- 발주잔량(=발주수량-입고수량-납품요청수량(작성중,요청완료,반려)+(작성중,반려)된 나의 납품요청수량) , IVDT.INV_QT AS IN_INV_QT -- 납품요청수량 , IVDT.INV_QT AS OLD_INV_QT -- 납품요청수량 ,(PODT.INV_QT, 0) AS INV_QT , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT -- 납품요청금액 , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , IVDT.VAT_AMT , IVHD.BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVDT.PR_BUYER_CD , IVDT.PR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM) JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ ,(SUM(IVDT.INV_QT), 0) AS INV_QT ,(SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT), 0) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '200', '400') -- 작성중(100), 검수요청(200), 반송(400) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* , CVUR.MAIL_FLAG , CVUR.SMS_FLAG ,GETUSERNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM -- 2021.06.30 : SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = A.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , A.PIC_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'INV' '@@' A.BUYER_CD '@@' A.INV_NUM AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM ( SELECT IVGH.GATE_CD , IVGH.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , POHD.SUBJECT ,(IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SEND_DATE ,(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) AS PIC_USER_ID FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} ) A JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = A.PIC_USER_ID) WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVHD.PURCHASE_TYPE , IVHD.INV_NUM , IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , IVDT.INV_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVHD.CUR , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , IVDT.ITEM_AMT ,(GRDT.GR_QT, 0) AS GR_QT , GRDT.GR_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , PODT.PO_NUM , PODT.PO_SQ , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , PODT.DUE_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE AS INV_DATE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(IVDT.ITEM_AMT / 11) WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(IVDT.ITEM_AMT * 0.1) ELSE 0 END) AS VAT_AMT , IVHD.REG_DATE , IVHD.MOD_DATE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , GRDT.GR_NUM ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '400' THEN IVGH.REJECT_DATE ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_DATE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '400' THEN IVGH.REJECT_RMK ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_RMK FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM) JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND IVHD.REG_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.REG_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
ORDER BY IVDT.INV_NUM DESC, IVDT.INV_SQ
